author: Lucky AI Team
name: lucky-ai
description: AI-powered Discord cog for roasts, TLDR summaries, chat Q&A, debate judging, and hot takes. Supports 7 AI providers with automatic fallback.
install_msg: cog installed ✅. run `[p]load lucky_ai` to activate the cog. and `[p]lsetup` to run the setup interactive wizard.
short: AI roasts, TLDRs, Q&A, and debates
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord message IDs, user IDs, and message content in a local SQLite database for AI processing (roasts, TLDRs, Q&A). Message content is only stored from channels explicitly configured by server admins. Users can opt out via `[p]loptout out`.
